context_for_next_testing_agent: All Chrome Extension features verified: 1) Admin tool form has credential type selection (cookies/token/localStorage/none) with appropriate fields for each type. 2) Token type shows header name, prefix, and value fields. 3) Extension settings checkboxes work correctly. 4) Client dashboard shows Chrome Extension download banner with correct link to /chrome-extension.zip. 5) Tools page uses 3-column grid layout.
